description: User examines the inbound flight search results, comparing options from Virgin Australia and Jetstar.
frame_description: The screen shows a list of flights with times, durations, and starting prices.

description: The UI updates to display fare selection options (Lite, Choice, Flex) for the 12:10pm flight.
frame_description: Three fare cards are displayed below the selected flight row.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...', indicating the system is processing the selection.
frame_description: A white loading screen with a blue spinner is visible.
